text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best today, Trainer!
choice_data_list: We'll go at your pace, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right! I have to focus on rehabilitation first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can't do any serious training while Nishino Flower is going
through rehabilitation, but there's still plenty we can do. If anything,
our days are busy.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, <username>! You look way more cheerful
than the last time I saw you! That's great! We were worried about you,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
You seemed pretty depressed, so we were thinking about taking you
out for a meal sometime—

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainers
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wh-what is it?!
choice_data_list: There's something I want to ask you!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You want our help filling in any gaps you might have as a trainer? Say
no more! Experience is the best teacher, but there are also things you
can only learn from your colleagues!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
I trained someone who injured themself the same way. I still have my
old notes, so I'll make copies of them for you.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainers
text_block_list.text: You've got this, rookie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using advice from my senior trainers, books I borrowed from the
library, and past notes, I start putting together a rehabilitation
program.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while rehabilitation is important, I'll need to think about what
comes after too. I'm racking my brain for ideas when I hear a knock at
the door.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Have you had lunch yet, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Huh? Is it that time already?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Actually, lunch started a few minutes ago. So, um... I made this
for you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping we could eat together, so I made lunch for both of us.
I'm pretty good at making meatballs with sweet vinegar sauce. Ehehe.
choice_data_list: Thank you. I can't wait to try it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad you like it. If there's anything else you'd like to eat, let
me know. I'll make it for our next lunch together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's rehabilitation period ends in the blink of an eye.
Now, we're ready to start training in earnest!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: We can finally start training! I'm ready to go whenever you are—
Wahey-hey!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Running besties for life! Girl, we run these sprints!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're so goated for that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! Next up is hill sprints, is it? Easy-peasy! As class rep, I'll
overcome any wall or incline that comes my way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Everyone's working so hard! And from today, I'll be joining them!)
choice_data_list:
Why don't we ease into things with a run on the
dirt course?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Do you think I'm going too easy on you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Not at all! You designed this program just for me, and I have faith in
you. So I'm not going to get ahead of myself by comparing myself to
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, time to get started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower begins her training. Gradually, she's able to
run at the pace she did before her injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also continue my studies, so I can be the trainer she deserves. Then,
one day, the academy announces that it's holding scrimmages.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A scrimmage... Eurgh. I feel so nervous.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(The last time I ran, I couldn't keep up, no matter how hard I tried.
The memory of that day still stings.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But... But I've been working really hard with Trainer. I'm sure I'll do
better this time—)
choice_data_list: Y-you'll do just fine out there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're shaking, Trainer. Are you nervous too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shakiness in my voice must be far from reassuring. But no matter
how nerve-racking the situation may be, my faith in Nishino Flower is
unshakable.
choice_data_list: I know you can win this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...!
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Inhale, exhale.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I know you can win this!"

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Trainer's voice was shaking, but I heard those words loud and clear. I can win this. My training will pay off.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer believes in me, so I'll do everything I can to share my courage
with them.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
("It's all right. Everything is going to be all right." That's what I want
to communicate through my running.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I want Trainer to be happy. Just like that day Mom and Dad smiled
so brightly!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I want to give courage to lots of people!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that's the race! It's Nishino Flower! Nishino Flower takes first
place!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I did, didn't I? Thank you! I... I'll do even better next time, so—
choice_data_list:
And I'll work even harder to become the trainer
you deserve!

And I'll work even harder to become the trainer
you deserve!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid the cheers, Nishino Flower smiles widely. Her expression
reminds me of that field of flowers we saw together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer, you always give everything one hundred percent. You work
hard—sometimes too hard.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(That's why someday, I want to win first place in a G1 race. I want to
give you the gift of a victory.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Thank you, Trainer, for always supporting my dreams.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Thank you for accepting the courage I shared with you.)
